component.name: Slate
component.summary: A native layered raster image editor for Linux

description.p: Slate is a GTK4 and libadwaita image editor for local raster work. It provides layered editing, masks, brush and eraser tools, crop controls, filters, image transforms, undo and redo, and a versioned project format.
Images remain on the local machine. Slate has no account, telemetry, cloud upload, or web runtime.
First complete native application release with project persistence, automated tests, CI, and Linux desktop integration.
